sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54456" key="katamagei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταμᾰγεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μάσσω</etym>) <sense id="n54456.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cloth for wiping</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.64</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
